title: Robot girlfriends, recursive AI agents, full AI research, Happy Horse: AI NEWS
summary: A YouTube news roundup video covering 20+ recent AI releases and tools including Happy Horse, SenseNova U1, Grok 4.3, Vista 4D, recursive multi-agent systems, and various open-source models. The host discusses new capabilities in video generation, motion capture, 3D reconstruction, multimodal agents, and language models from providers like NVIDIA, Anthropic, xAI, and Mistral.
